MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DEXTER CATO AND ASHLEY CATO'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE ATTORNEY VERIFICATION IS PERMITTED BY STATUTE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). ANSWER TO BE FILED BY JANUARY 20, 2011 TO WHICH NOTICE WAS WAIVED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DEXTER CATO AND ASHLEY CATO'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 6, 2011 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ENDORSED FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN CONFORMITY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B) NO LATER THAT JANUARY 4, 2011. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
